chunks.text: ORDER SHEET THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP No.D-6964 of 2018 Date Order with signature of Judge(s) 1. For orders on CMA No.30526/2018. 2. For hearing of CMA No.30527/2018. 3. For hearing of main case. 13.09.2021 Mr. Ghulam Murtaza, advocate for the respondent No.4. Mr. Khalid Rajpar, advocate for the respondent No.6 Mr. Kafeel Ahmed Abbasi, Deputy Attorney General and Mr. Hussain Bohra, Assistant Attorney General. Mr. Tariq Aziz, Principal Appraiser, PMBQ. ********** Mr. Adnan Motan, advocate holding brief for Mr. Asad Raza Khan, advocate with additional instructions not to press this petition. Accordingly this petition alongwith pending application is dismissed as not pressed. JUDGE JUDGE Khuhro/PA
